profile.coordinateSystem: normalized top-left origin; containment windows are divided by the 612×792 PDF page geometry and rounded to six decimals
profile.normalization: Unicode NFC; collapse Unicode whitespace to one ASCII space; preserve accents, case, punctuation, and printed decimal precision

qualityControls: The committed attestation binds the locked PDF SHA-256, page, table, row, cell, rectangle, token, and normalized value.
The offline verifier re-extracts words from locally supplied official bytes and fails on any source, token, coordinate, table, row, cell, or coverage mismatch.
Two decimal digits are preserved where printed; TL/TLd preserve one decimal digit.
